sub_goals.description: src/ui/ring.js (oval SVG ring + adaptive seat positions + animation)
src/ui/card.js (inline-SVG cards, all 52, 4-color toggle via CSS vars)
src/ui/betting.js (controls + action clock with server turn_started_at)
src/ui/table.js (community cards + pot + action-history strip + button/SB/BB indicators + Firestore listener glue)

verification_summary: S5.A1-A7 verified. Ring rendered as <ellipse> with @keyframes glow animation; computeSeatPositions yields 180-degree separation for 2 seats and ~40-degree for 9 seats; action clock reads server turn_started_at; betting controls hidden on non-acting player; cards are inline <svg>; 4-color toggle changes --suit-diamond + --suit-club CSS vars; in heads-up, button + SB co-located on same seat.
